description: Product Description Every baby's wardrobe has bodysuits! kavkas solid color bodysuit are made of 100% premium cotton fabric, softest touch, breathable, strechy and comfortable for your baby's delicate skin, expandable lap shoulders and envelop collar design allow the garment to slip over baby's head in total comfort, bottom snap closure design are convenience for dressing and diapering. These baby boys and girls bodysuits comes in a wide range of sizes to fit babies through all of their developmental milestones, 5 colors available: white, black, gray, red, blue. A must have for your baby's wardrobe! The Bodysuits are an excellent choice for all seasons and any time of day! Classic U neck design Fit baby’s neck, expandable lap shoulder neckline to help pull garment easily over baby's head Snap buttons crotch Nickel-free snaps on reinforced panels for easy dressing and diapering Comfy fit Comfortable ribbed leg opening for a perfect fit 100% soft cotton Premium baby soft cotton comfortable for baby’s delicate skin Customer Reviews Price Material 100% Cotton 100% Cotton 100% Cotton 100% Cotton 100% Cotton 100% Cotton
